name: zindex_archive_free_records_and_reset
description: zIndexArchive::FreeRecordsAndReset frees the record table when present and resets the archive fields to the closed empty state.
known_limits: VC5SP3 cl 11.00.7022 x86 /O2 /Ob0 /Zp4 /FAcs COFF byte comparison for ?FreeRecordsAndReset@zIndexArchive@@QAEXXZ at 0x4a6330 still fails: 27 unmasked mismatches, 4 relocation bytes masked, 2 trailing VC NOP bytes trimmed, BN size 47 bytes, VC object symbol size 48 bytes.
Reviewed difference is import-call spelling and displacement-format/code-layout drift around free and the reset stores; the instruction sequence is otherwise behavior-equivalent.
The native smokes exercise record-table freeing through archive unload and dirty close, then validate closed-state field reset.
